title: CARCHcraft
description: Modpack for me and my friends it has some stuff
body: Just a little kitchen sink modpack for me and my friends. Includes various mods such as Tech Reborn, AE2, Create, Bewitchment, Hexalia, and a lot of mods to change world gen, give decorative blocks, and adds a new dark darker yet darker dimension. **Be sure to set up your simple voice chat even if you don't plan on talking** it is pretty easy all you have to do is go to the mod list, hover over the Simple Voice Chat icon, and then click and it will prompt you on how to set up the mod. You **MUST** manually allocate at least 4GB of RAM to the modpack, people with **4-5GB of RAM allocated** should have the modpack run fine if you aren't having to generate terrain on a solo world but **8GB is best**. I didn't notice lag on 4GB allocated ram except when generating new terrain. Also before joining the server, be sure to go to the mod menu, look up Simple Voice Chat, go to In Game Menu, and then set the speakers and microphone.
